subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast arisen to serve the Cause of God with all thy being! What thou hadst written as to the school is a cause for great rejoicing… This school is one of the vital and essential institutions which indeed support and bulwark the edifice of humankind
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من قام بکلبیه علی خدمه امرالله آنچه در خصوص دارالتعلیم مرقوم نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge
